titleStmt.title: SII 20.50: original edition by G. S. Gai
No. 50. (B.K. No. 61 of 1935-36.) SAUNDATTI, PARASGAD TALUK, BELGAUM DISTRICT.

p.hi: Slab set up in the Taluk Office.

summary.p: The bottom of the stone is broken and lost. Refers to Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Kārttavīryarasa of Lattalūrapura and contains the genealogical account of his family. Mentions Arhaṇandi-munīndra and Kaṇḍūr Gaṇa.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© bhadramastu jinaśāsanāya . śrīmatparamagaṁbhīra syādvādāmōghalāṁcchanaṁ jīyāttraiḷōkyanāthasya śāsanaṁ jinaśāsanaṁ .
© svasti samastabhuvanāśrayaśrīpṛthvīvallabhamahārājādhirājaparamēśvaraparamabhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāśrayakuḷati
ḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmadbhuvanaikamalladēvara vijayarājyamuttarōttarābhivṛddhipravarddhamānamācandrārkkatāraṁ
saluttamire tatpādapadmōpajīvi samadhigatapaṁcamahāśabdamahāmaṇḍaḷēśvaraṁ latta lūrppuravarēśvaraṁ trivaḷitūryya
nirgghōṣaṇaṁ vairikuḷaviḷayāntakavibhīṣaṇaṁ sindūralāṁcchanaṁ samastavidyā viriṁcchanaṁ suvarṇṇagaruḍadhvajaṁ vidagdhamu
gdhāṁganāmakaradhvajaṁ raṭṭakuḷavanajavanamārttaṇḍaṁ kadanapracaṇḍaṁ ripusamaravīravṛkōdaraṁ paranārīsahōdaraṁ sāha
sōttuṁga sēnana siṁga nāmādi samastapraśastisahitaṁ śrīmanmahāmaṇḍaḷēśvaraṁ kārttyavīryarasara vaṁśāvatārameṁteṁdaḍe .
© śrīramaṇanatuḷavijayaśrīramaṇaṁ vipuḷavimaḷasamuditakīrttiśrīramaṇaṁ caturavacaśrīrama
ṇaṁ nannabhūpananupamarūpa . Atana tanaya . sthiranuḍivaṁ kalitanadoḷporedāḷiṁ munnamiṟivanendaḍe sakaḷōrvvareyoḷ
kattana satyada doregaṁ śāryyada podaḷkegaṁ samanuḷvare . Antenisida vīra kattarasaniṁ piriya . v® . vasudhācakrado
ḷeṁtu baṇnisuvudaṁ tannōje tannēḷge tannesakaṁ tanna pogartte tanna vibhavaṁ tannōje tannudghasāhasasaṁpannateyiṁ dharāvaḷeya
maṁ nānāvidhaṁ kūḍe mudrisidaṁ raṭṭara mēru ḍāyimamahīpāḷaṁ nṛpāḷō ttamaṁ . tadanuja . surakujamaṁ paḷaṁcaleva
ḍāvaguṇaṁ sale saṁda vajrapaṁjaramananārataṁ paḷivutirpudu kāvaguṇaṁ parīkṣisalsaradhiyaneydeṟeva
pudu tanna gabhīraguṇaṁ samantu dikparivṛḍhadēḷgeyaṁ naguvududghaguṇa kali kannabhūpana . tatsuta . ka . nirupama samastā
kaḍeyoḷsarasijabhavaneseva vādyavidyādharanoḷḷarasankaśaṁkaraṁ kappuravarṣanripage ne garddaneṟegamahīśa . tadanuja . v® .
kadanadoḷāntarātigahiyallada rāhu dvijātirūpanallada vinatāsutaṁ rvva daḷḷuriyallada vahni kāḷanallada javaṁ na
madhyagatanallada bāva stamānamillada raviyeṁdoḍāṁpadaṭarā ṇāgradoḷaṁkabhūpana . tadagrajanappeṟaga
bhūpātmaja . Ā suhṛdbhūpatikirīṭatāḍitapadaṁ vī�ganāliṁganōllasitāṁgaṁ harahāsākāśa śaśikāntākā
śagaṁgājaḷaprasarōghadigaṁtakīrttitapanapradyōtasanmūrtti sada jadguṇadīpavartti nega śrīsēnabhūpā
ḷaka . tattanaya . Aribhūpāḷakṛtāṁtanuddhataripukṣmāpāḷasandōhabhīkarakāḷānaḷanu tada
bhayankara prabhāvaḷa mēghālaya kāḷōtpātavātaṁ kṣitīśvara cūḍāma
tēśaṁ kīrttiśrīvanitādhīśa nuditasamśuddhavacaśrīramaṇīśaṁ vīra
nārādhipa dēvanudghacaritarvvidyāvanāṭāsana rugaḷvirō
janakanurvvījāte pratyakṣa gōmini tāyi maiḷaladēviyeṁdadhika ḷaka
noḷsamarakkivarpparīkṣitipatisainiravadhūprakara Ātana kuḷāṁgane
© śrīvanite tāne baṁdu mahīvanitege tiḷakamenisi kattana vakṣaśrīvanite negardda maiḷaladēvi jagajjanani sajjanā
graṇiyeniku . Ā daṁpatigaḷge girisutegaṁ haraṁgamanurāgade ṣaṇmukhaneṁtu puṭṭuvaṁtira negaḻdiḻda rugmiṇigamā harigaṁ
smaraneṁtu puṭṭuvaṁtire sale kontigaṁ ravigamarkkātanūbhavaneṁtu puṭṭuvaṁtire Avarggoldu puṭṭidanku gaguṁ
li sēnabhūbhuja . © Avanīpāḷānataśrīpādakamaḷayugaṁ tatvanirṇṇiktarāddhāntavidaṁ cā ratnā
karanamaḷavacaśrīvadhūkāṁtanaṁgōdbhavadarppāraṇyadāvānaḷanuditalasadghōrasaṁśuddha nētraṁ
ravicaṁ sāṁbuja dinapana ghādrisadvajrapāta . ka . kaṇḍūrggaṇābdhicaṁdrana khaṇḍitasutapōvibhāsi kha
ravēdaṇḍa narhaṇandimunīṁdra . mallikāmāle . kanturāja gajēṁdra kēsari bhavya
yaṁ śāntamūrtti digaṁtakīrtti virājita
Digital edition of SII 20.50 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
